notes: CRITICAL fix: daily go chain previously seeded its first word with the same getDailyAnswerIndex as daily og, so go word #1 == og daily answer. Added getDailyGoSeedIndex(dateKey, answerCount) with a stable go salt: og index + deterministic offset in [1, answerCount-1] from a pure integer hash of the day number, guaranteeing go index != og index for pools > 1. createDailyGoSetup now uses it. Determinism per dateKey preserved; five-word distinctness intact. Tests prove inequality across 400/120 dates at length 5.
